CustomField.formula: IF( OR( (MONTH(TODAY()) >= 7 && NOT(AND( YEAR(occur_revenu_month__c) = YEAR(TODAY()), MONTH(occur_revenu_month__c) >= 7 ))), (MONTH(TODAY()) < 7 && NOT(AND( YEAR(occur_revenu_month__c) = YEAR(TODAY()) - 1, MONTH(occur_revenu_month__c) >= 7 )) && NOT(AND( YEAR(occur_revenu_month__c) = YEAR(TODAY()), MONTH(occur_revenu_month__c) < 7 ))) ), 0, IF( spot__c = TRUE, Estimated_Amount__c, IF( MONTH(occur_revenu_month__c) >= 7, Estimated_Amount__c / 12 * (13 - MONTH(occur_revenu_month__c)), Estimated_Amount__c / 12 * (7 - MONTH(occur_revenu_month__c)) ) ) )
CustomField.label: 今期売上想定額_Old
